name: Indefinite Meeting
overview:
Fu Jing Xuan and Chu Qing Xue, a couple who have been together for eight years, once shared a dream and successfully founded the Muxue Group, a brilliant enterprise that bears witness to their love and struggle. In the past, their feelings were like the blazing summer sun, intense and sincere, and every glance between them was filled with affection and tacit understanding.

However, as the years passed, Fu Jing Xuan gradually lost himself in the torrent of his career and increasingly ignored Chu Qing Xue's delicate and sensitive feelings. Faced with this increasingly indifferent love, Chu Qing Xue, after tossing and turning countless nights, finally made the painful decision to leave Fu Jing Xuan and accepted a family-arranged marriage as a farewell and rebirth of her eight years of love.

trailers.title: He Delayed Wedding 99 Times for Mistress, She Threw Ring&Wed CEO Instead—He Panicked!
Fiancé ignored her for mistress—On wedding day, she married a Billionaire CEO instead. He panicked!
